case_title: HILDA & ALICE, INC. VS. DNA BESO, INC. DBA BESO ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILDA & ALICE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DNA BESO, INC. DBA BESO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-18-2019
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 64371591)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 64236756), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILDA & ALICE, INC. SERVED AUG-30-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DNA BESO, INC. DBA BESO
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 64324243) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF HILDA & ALICE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DNA BESO, INC. DBA BESO
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 64328889) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $500.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 64328889) AS TO DEFENDANT DNA BESO, INC. DBA BESO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILDA & ALICE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DNA BESO, INC. DBA BESO $20,649.71 PRINCIPAL, $2,400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,606.08 INTEREST, $500.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $26,155.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 64328889)

DECLARATION OF JENNIFER SMITH RE DEFAULT (TRANSACTION ID # 64328889) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILDA & ALICE, INC.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 64390447) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILDA & ALICE, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-26-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-26-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
